name: Batter’s Place Pickleball Complex
description: Batter’s Place Pickleball Complex is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Chattanooga, TN. There are 5 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Brainerd Crossroads-BX
description: Brainerd Crossroads-BX is a place to play pickleball in Chattanooga, TN. There are 4 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include food, restrooms, and locker rooms. A membership is required to play.

name: Chester Frost
description: Chester Frost is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in United States, TN. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Downtown Family YMCA
description: Downtown Family YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Chattanooga, TN. There is 1 indoor wood court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The court can be reserved. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. A membership is required to play.

name: East Ridge Community / Senior Center
description: East Ridge Community / Senior Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in East Ridge, TN. There are 2 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts can be reserved. The courts are private. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.
open_play_schedule: Open to public with set hours Mon - Fri

name: Frances B. Wyatt Community Center
description: Frances B. Wyatt Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Chattanooga, TN. There are 4 wood and hard courts. 3 are indoors and 1 is outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Hardy’s Chapel Community Center
description: Hardy’s Chapel Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in United States, TN. There is 1 indoor wood court. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The court is free. You can reserve the court.

description: The Goat Pickleball & Fitness Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Chattanooga, TN. There are 12 indoor asphalt courts. The facility includes amenities like food, locker rooms, restrooms, water, youth programming, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, and trainers or lessons.
